hero.eyebrow: Removals & Man with a Van in Lisbon
hero.title: Lisbon's Trusted Removal & House Moving Company
hero.subtitle: Professional removals in Lisbon and across Portugal. House moves, apartment relocations, office removals, furniture disposal and junk clearance — handled by a local, English-speaking team.

howItWorks.label: How It Works
howItWorks.title: From quote to move-in day — we make it simple
howItWorks.subtitle: A stress-free moving experience across Lisbon, Cascais, Sintra, and all of Portugal.
howItWorks.step1Text: Describe your move or the items you need removed. Takes less than 2 minutes.
howItWorks.step2Text: We review the details and send you a transparent, no-obligation quote within hours.
howItWorks.step3Text: Our trained team arrives on schedule with the right van, equipment, and packing materials.
howItWorks.step4Text: We unload, assemble furniture if needed, and responsibly dispose of unwanted items.

services.label: Our Services
services.title: Moving and removal services across Lisbon and Portugal
services.subtitle: Whether you're moving apartment in Alfama or relocating from Lisbon to Porto, we've got you covered.
services.s1Text: Full-service home moving across Lisbon — from studios in Bairro Alto to villas in Cascais. We pack, load, transport, and unload.
services.s2Text: Relocating from Lisbon to Porto, Algarve, Coimbra or anywhere in Portugal? We handle nationwide moves with care.
services.s3Text: Old sofa, bed, or mattress you can't get rid of? We remove and responsibly dispose of unwanted furniture and bulky items.
services.s4Text: House clearance, garage clear-outs, post-renovation debris. We take away anything you don't want — sorted and recycled where possible.
services.s5Text: Minimise downtime with our office removal service. Evening and weekend moves available across Greater Lisbon.
services.s6Text: Need a small move, single-item delivery or IKEA pickup? Our flexible man-and-van service is available by the hour.

areas.label: Service Areas
areas.title: Moving across Lisbon and beyond
areas.subtitle: Local knowledge of every neighbourhood — and every narrow street, steep hill and staircase that comes with them.
areas.lisbonCentreList: Alfama, Baixa, Bairro Alto, Chiado, Príncipe Real, Mouraria
areas.greaterLisbonList: Cascais, Estoril, Sintra, Oeiras, Almada, Amadora, Odivelas
areas.portugalList: Porto, Algarve, Coimbra, Braga, Évora, Faro, Setúbal, Madeira

testimonials.label: Reviews
testimonials.title: What our customers say
testimonials.t1Quote: Moved from a 4th-floor walk-up in Alfama to a house in Cascais. The team was punctual, careful with every box, and even took away an old mattress we'd been trying to dispose of for months.
testimonials.t2Quote: I booked them for an office relocation in Parque das Nações. Professional, bilingual team — everything was set up at the new office the same day. Couldn't recommend them more.
testimonials.t3Quote: Needed help clearing out my late grandmother's apartment in Graça. They handled everything with sensitivity — sorted what could be donated, disposed of the rest, and left the place spotless.
